name: Next Green Wave Holdings Inc.
summary: Next Green Wave Holdings Inc. cultivates and distributes medicinal and recreational cannabis in California. It is also involved in the processing, production, and packaging of dry flower, cannabis oils, and concentrates. The company offers its products under the Loki the Dog, Carey Hart, King Louie, Sketchy Tank, Junkyard, SD Cannabis, Thorn St. Brewing, Toy Machine Co, and Junkyard brands. The company was formerly known as Crossgate Capital Corporation and changed its name to Next Green Wave Holdings Inc. in August 2018. Next Green Wave Holdings Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
